name: sports-mcp
description: Sports MCP centered on soccer (football), with other major sports covered lighter: how each sport works (rules, positions, formations, tactics), and how talent is really identified — the four-corners scouting model (technical, tactical, physical, psychological), the concrete markers scouts look for, the development pathway, and the honest odds (relative age effect, late bloomers, pro is a lottery). Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
